title: Terpsichore gradata
taxonomy: Terpsichore gradata is classified as a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as the polypody ferns. This classification places it within the order Polypodiales and class Polypodiopsida. At the kingdom level, it is classified as Plantae, indicating its status as a plant. Further classification includes division Pteridophyta, which includes all ferns. This classification helps to organize and understand the relationships between different plant species.
